hero.label: The Definitive MX-5 Encyclopedia
hero.subtitle: Four generations. Hundreds of special editions. One obsession. The most comprehensive resource on the world's best-selling roadster.

buying_guide.title: Buying Guide
buying_guide.desc: What to look for, common problems by generation, price ranges, and the definitive checklist before you buy your first (or next) MX-5.

mods.title: Mods & Tuning
mods.desc: From coilovers to turbo kits. Every popular modification documented with real-world results, costs, and installation difficulty.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Service intervals, common failure points, DIY guides, and part numbers. Everything to keep your roadster on the road.

motorsport.title: Motorsport
motorsport.desc: Spec Miata, Global MX-5 Cup, autocross builds, and track day prep. The MX-5's racing heritage documented.

search.heading: Find anything about the MX-5
search.subtitle: Search across all generations, editions, modifications, and guides
search.placeholder: Search Miatapedia... (e.g. 'NA8 diff ratios', '30th Anniversary specs')

footer.tagline: The MX-5 Encyclopedia — Not affiliated with Mazda Motor Corporation
footer.subtitle: Built with obsession, not obligation

specialEditions.title: MX-5 Special Editions
specialEditions.description: From the iconic British Racing Green to the ultra-rare 100th Anniversary, explore the most coveted MX-5 special editions that have captured enthusiast hearts for over three decades.

investmentPoints.ultraRare: Ultra-rare editions: 100th Anniversary, Mazdaspeed appreciating rapidly
investmentPoints.conditionIsKing: Condition is king: Low-mileage, unmodified examples command premium
investmentPoints.documentationMatters: Documentation matters: Original window stickers and certificates add value

lookForPoints.authenticity: Authenticity: Verify VIN, build sheets, and special edition features
lookForPoints.originality: Originality: Unmodified examples with original paint and interior
lookForPoints.serviceHistory: Service history: Complete maintenance records and regular care

specialEditions.collectorTipText: Special editions represent the peak of MX-5 exclusivity and engineering. Each tells a unique story of Mazda's innovation and the MX-5's cultural impact. Choose based on personal connection, rarity, and long-term appreciation potential.
specialEditions.pricingVaries: Pricing varies based on condition, mileage, and originality
specialEditions.discoverComplete: Discover the complete history of MX-5 special editions and their unique stories

historicalContext.title: The Legacy of Special Editions
historicalContext.description: Special editions represent Mazda's celebration of the MX-5's enduring appeal and cultural significance. Each edition tells a story of innovation, commemoration, or regional pride, making them highly sought-after by collectors and enthusiasts worldwide.

buyingGuide.title: MX-5 Buying Guide
buyingGuide.subtitle: Complete buying guides for every MX-5 generation. Learn what to look for, common issues, pricing expectations, and get expert advice for finding your perfect Miata.

quickStart.title: Quick Start: Which Generation for You?

prioritiesGuide.ncNd: NC or ND with modern features
prioritiesGuide.naNbWeight: NA/NB for weight, ND for rigidity

risingValues.title: Rising Values
risingValues.description: Clean NA and NB examples are appreciating. Low-mileage, original cars command premium prices.

bestValues.title: Best Values
bestValues.description: NC generation offers modern features at reasonable prices. PRHT models particularly attractive.

avoid.title: Avoid
avoid.description: High-mileage examples without service history, extensive modifications, or rust issues.

buyingGuide.eachGenerationUnique: Each generation has unique characteristics, common issues, and price considerations. Choose your generation below for detailed buying advice.

generationDescriptions.NA: The classic. Perfect for enthusiasts who want the pure roadster experience with iconic pop-up headlights.
generationDescriptions.NB: The sweet spot. More refined than NA with modern conveniences, excellent aftermarket support.
generationDescriptions.NC: The practical choice. Contemporary safety, optional hardtop, comfortable for daily driving.
generationDescriptions.ND: The latest evolution. Modern technology meets classic MX-5 DNA with excellent build quality.

mods.title: MX-5 Modifications
mods.subtitle: Transform your MX-5 with proven modifications. From simple bolt-ons to complete engine swaps, discover the best upgrades for every skill level and budget.
mods.chooseCategory: Choose your modification category below for detailed guides, part recommendations, and installation tips from the community.

suspension.title: Suspension Mods
suspension.description: Coilovers, sway bars, strut bars, and chassis reinforcement for improved handling and cornering.

exhaust.title: Exhaust Systems
exhaust.description: Cat-back exhausts, headers, and complete systems for improved sound and performance gains.

forcedInduction.title: Forced Induction
forcedInduction.description: Turbocharger and supercharger kits for significant horsepower gains and enhanced performance.

engineSwaps.title: Engine Swaps
engineSwaps.description: LS V8, Honda K-series, and rotary swaps for maximum power and unique character.
